2138830.name: Grand Tactician: The Civil War - Whiskey & Lemons
2138830.description:
Whiskey & Lemons introduces a new Career mode, that adds role playing elements to the Grand Tactician: The Civil War campaigns. Create your own character, follow your commanders' orders, gain prestige and promotions. When in position to do so, play a key role in your nation's war-effort. This is your Civil War story!



Features:

Your Story: Create your own commander character with unique personality and skills. Role-play through the war to see your character develop.
Do Your Part: Start your career as a low ranking commander, following orders from your higher-ups. Gain promotions to allow more control over the course of the war.
Manage Your Career: Gain prestige and earn money to equip yourself and your unit, recruit staff officers to your headquarters and decide your personal actions.
Make History: Play a key role in your nation's war-effort, and become one of the legendary Civil War generals. Read about your epic adventures in your Biography.
Regimental Level Campaign: A new campaign covering the Eastern Theater of the Civil War, that can be played in normal and career modes. Offers regimental level game play.
New Features: Deployable garrisons, and Grouper command level for Army Groups in main campaigns and Armies in regiment level campaigns.
2138830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
